name: Shukrael Mohammed
headline: Full-Stack & Android Developer
summary: Full-Stack & Android developer and Software Engineering student (3rd year) focused on building scalable, efficient, user-friendly web and mobile applications.
Strong across both frontend and backend development, with a bias toward clean architecture, responsive UI, and reliable APIs.
Actively learning modern technologies and looking for opportunities to gain practical experience, contribute to impactful projects, and grow as a professional developer.

experience.title: Freelance / Personal Projects
bullets: Developed responsive web applications and mobile apps.
Built RESTful APIs and integrated frontend with backend systems.
Practiced clean code and version control using Git.

projects.title: Campus Connect Portal

projects.title: Freelance Invoice Manager
projects.summary: Full-stack dashboard to generate invoices, track payments, and export monthly reports.
